spacesuit_gen_laser_01_macro.description: The hand laser is the entry level sidearm. Being marginally more suitable for cutting chelt meat than for actual combat, it has spawned the now famous idiom, "Never bring a hand laser to a blaster fight".
spacesuit_gen_laser_01_macro.name: Hand Laser

spacesuit_gen_laser_02_macro.description: The Personal Blaster is a sidearm often preferred by those who cannot rely on their targets keeping still long enough for a hand laser to yield damage.
spacesuit_gen_laser_02_macro.name: Personal Blaster

spacesuit_gen_repairweapon_01_macro.description: A spacesuit-borne repair function, directed and powered through a narrow energy beam. While a labour-intensive means of repair, stricken pilots may find substantial comfort in its distinctive, green flashes.
spacesuit_gen_repairweapon_01_macro.name: Repair Laser

turret_arg_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.description: The Beam Turret is an entry-level defensive weapon system commonly selected by operators for its low acquisition cost. Its extensive effective range and high targeting accuracy make it particularly suitable for missile defence duties. While the weapon is effective against shielded targets, its damage output decreases as shields are depleted, limiting its effectiveness against exposed hull structures.nnThe L Beam Turret is an upgraded variant of the standard system, offering increased emitter capacity and sustained output. However, as with smaller variants, effectiveness against hull structures is reduced once shields are fully depleted. In single, forward-facing configurations, the system is nevertheless commonly employed to disrupt travel drive operation.
turret_arg_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.name: ARG L Beam Turret Mk1

turret_arg_l_laser_01_mk1_macro.description: The Pulse Turret is a versatile weapon, but is of limited use against capital ships and stations due to its relatively low damage output. It can otherwise be considered effective in engagement of a wide variety of targets.nnThe Large Pulse Turret improves on the performance of the medium-class version. In this format, its ability to inflict damage on all classes of target make it a true all-rounder.
turret_arg_l_laser_01_mk1_macro.name: ARG L Pulse Turret Mk1

turret_arg_l_plasma_01_mk1_macro.description: The greatest strength of the Plasma Turret is that it is an intrinsically "cool" technology, negating the need for the integrated cooling systems that are a feature of most armaments. This allows this otherwise relatively slow turret to be a constant threat to larger adversaries.nnThe Large Plasma Turret implementation is a preferred choice for capital ships, where the number of emplacements can offset the limitations in manoeuvrability.
turret_arg_l_plasma_01_mk1_macro.name: ARG L Plasma Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_flak_01_mk1_macro.description: Modern Flak Turret technology has not yet been fully exploited throughout the known systems, and it is jealously guarded by those who have access to it. It is a highly effective weapon at close quarters, particularly against fighters, due to its blast damage radius.nnThe Argon model has excellent projectile accuracy.
turret_arg_m_flak_01_mk1_macro.name: ARG M Flak Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.name: ARG M Bolt Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.description: This turret weapon is optimised for medium-sized targets, as it lacks the accuracy to counter fighters, and the damage potential to take on capital ships effectively.nnThe Shard Turret delivers a spread of projectiles with a relatively short range. Heat management is a consideration for users of this weapon.
turret_arg_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.name: ARG M Shard Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_shotgun_02_mk1_macro.description: This turret weapon is optimised for medium-sized targets, as it lacks the accuracy to counter fighters, and the damage potential to take on capital ships effectively.nnThe Shard Turret delivers a spread of projectiles with a relatively short range. Heat management is a consideration for users of this weapon.
turret_arg_m_shotgun_02_mk1_macro.name: ARG M Shard Turret Mk1

turret_gen_m_disabler_01_mk1_macro.description: The Distortion Turret is the turret-mounted variant of the Heavy Distortion Pulsor, developed by the Joint Teladi Defence Consortium for the Ministry of Finance. It fires a coherent matter wave at relativistic speed which discharges on impact, temporarily disabling and immobilising smaller targets. The weapon's high accuracy stems from its underlying quantum emission principle. The Distortion Turret can be fitted to a wide range of vessels.
turret_gen_m_disabler_01_mk1_macro.name: TEL M Distortion Turret Mk1

turret_gen_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.description: The Autocannon Turret appears to be based on leaked blueprints from a joint Argon Federation and Ministry of Finance weapons systems study. The source of the leak remains unidentified. The Autocannon is a purely kinetic weapon that fires non-explosive tungsten slugs in short bursts with high accuracy. While not as technologically advanced as some newer energy weapons, the Autocannon remains a highly capable and sought-after system. Available through unsanctioned arms dealers, the Autocannon Turret can be fitted to a wide range of vessels.
turret_gen_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.name: M Autocannon Turret Mk1

turret_gen_m_scrapbeam_01_mk1_macro.description: The Scrap Tractor employs an array of graviton beams to leash an object to a towing ship. The beams automatically and independently adjust their focus to further enhance the gravitational forces as the distance between the two objects becomes greater, resulting in an elasticity effect. All resistance is not futile, however, since severe disruptions, such as being hit by weapon fire, will cause the connection to break. Likewise, the graviton beams are inherently unstable until the artificial gravitational field is fully engaged, and even minor distortions such as the lingering effects of depleted shields, or electrical currents behind the target's hull, will prompt them to lose focus. Because of these limitations, the Scrap Tractor is mainly used to tow ship wrecks below a certain size limit, to avoid exceeding the maximum energy output of the weapon mount. For reasons which are not entirely clear, the connection remains stable during Jump Gate traversals.nnThe modern Scrap Tractor has only recently been made available to the wider Gate Network by the Alliance of the Word. The Alliance received the designs for it by deep space messenger drone, sent from the Avarice system, which was once thought lost. It is, however, by no means an entirely new technology. Before the Terran Conflict, and even up until the Gate Shutdown, a predecessor of this weapon - or rather tool - was occasionally deployed by opportunistic scavengers, looking to profit from the ongoing destruction of advanced warships in conflict zones. However, due to the general abundance of resources in the well-connected Gate Network at the time, and the inherent danger of the profession, it never saw widespread use, and the factories necessary for its production were often dismantled as quickly as they sprung up.
turret_gen_m_scrapbeam_01_mk1_macro.name: Scrap Tractor

turret_gen_m_shieldpierce_01_mk1_macro.description: The Scalar Aperture Turret  is the turret-mounted variant of the Heavy Scalar Aperture Emitter. It is a high-energy weapon system that bypasses conventional shielding by exploiting Planck-time discontinuities in shield emitter cycles. These micro-apertures allow the beam to inflict direct damage to hull and structural elements, making it effective for disabling capital ships or other targets. Enhanced tracking algorithms maximise dwell time on moving targets, placing the Scalar Aperture Turret in direct competition with conventional energy weapons. The SAT can be fitted to a wide range of vessels.
turret_gen_m_shieldpierce_01_mk1_macro.name: ARG M Scalar Aperture Turret Mk1

turret_gen_m_yacht_01_mk1_macro.description: "You won't believe how many pointless features this turret has that nobody asked for. I can also immediately tell, without looking at it, that the target acquisition code suffers from extreme spaghettification. It's unfathomable to me, how the designers can keep adding functions to each version before ironing out the countless flaws that have riddled it since its inception. I should have known better than to buy anything that comes out of Windfall these days. Those swindlers on Aurora are the worst of the bunch. Have I mentioned that the AI in this thing is atrocious? 7/10" - Anonymous
turret_gen_m_yacht_01_mk1_macro.name: Astrid M Turret

turret_kha_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.description: The Kyon Turret, evolved from the dreaded Kyon Beams that haunt the nightmares of spacefaring civilisations. This formidable turret variant embodies the relentless and insidious nature of its creators.nnThough individually the damage of a single Kyon beam may appear modest for its size, its true potency lies in its ability to saturate the battlefield with a relentless barrage of energy pulses. Where Kha'ak vessels swarm, these turrets serve as harbingers of chaos, inflicting unavoidable damage on any who oppose them.
turret_kha_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.name: KHA L Kyon Turret Mk1

turret_kha_m_beam_01_mk1_macro.description: Utilising the same technology as the Kyon Emitter, the Kha'ak Kyon Turret is a formidable defensive weapon, often adorning the species' stations in large numbers.
turret_kha_m_beam_01_mk1_macro.name: KHA M Kyon Turret Mk1

turret_par_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.description: The Mass Driver launches a single high-energy kinetic projectile capable of retaining accuracy and effectiveness over extended ranges. Thermal charging commences upon weapon activation, allowing the operator to either discharge immediately or delay firing for improved targeting.
turret_par_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.name: PAR L Mass Driver Turret Mk1

turret_par_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.description: The Blast Mortar fires a compact high-explosive charge encapsulated by superheated chondritic material. A proximity fuse triggers detonation near the target, with a wide blast radius compensating for the system's limited accuracy. The affected area is sufficient to neutralise multiple surface elements on capital ships with a single discharge.nnIt is often compared favourably to the Plasma Cannon due to its higher projectile velocity, enabling limited engagement of smaller targets when required. However, it is not a flak weapon and is most effectively employed against medium or larger vessels that cannot readily evade fire.nnDeveloped before the formal proclamation of the Holy Order of the Pontifex, the Blast Mortar reflects early Paranid efforts to maximise combat effectiveness under constrained industrial capacity. The result is a weapon that combines high destructive output with relative manufacturing simplicity.
turret_par_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.name: PAR M Blast Mortar Turret Mk1

However, it is not a flak weapon and is most effectively employed against medium or larger vessels that cannot readily evade fire.nnDeveloped before the formal proclamation of the Holy Order of the Pontifex, the Blast Mortar reflects early Paranid efforts to maximise combat effectiveness under constrained industrial capacity. The result is a weapon that combines high destructive output with relative manufacturing simplicity.
turret_par_m_shotgun_02_mk1_macro.name: PAR M Blast Mortar Turret Mk1

turret_pir_l_battleship_01_laser_01_mk1_.description: The Erlking L Turret fires a single high speed projectile, superheated and accelerated by a custom pulsed laser. While fixed weapons usually outperform their turret counterparts of the same size, the Erlking's turrets are an unusual exception; the damage from this turret is comparable to, and might even exceed, that of L Pulse Laser weapons at close range. Over distance, however, the damage output falls off steeply, and at maximum range barely matches that of a standard L Pulse Laser turret. Although the Erlking is perfectly capable of defending itself at a distance, the high damage output of its turrets at short range makes it much more dangerous at close proximity, meaning that aggressive manoeuvres by the Erlking's pilot are rewarded. This exceptional performance is attributed to the Erlking's power core, from which the turrets draw energy.nnBoso Ta commented that this turret employs electronic redundancies designed to be especially robust against internal radiation damage, and that this is necessary due to its slight but continuous exposure to the power core.
turret_pir_l_battleship_01_laser_01_mk1_.name: Erlking L Turret

turret_pir_m_battleship_01_gatling_02_mk.description: The Erlking M Turret fires bursts of high speed projectiles, reminiscent of Bolt Repeater burst fire. While fixed weapons usually outperform their turret counterparts of the same size, the Erlking's turrets are an unusual exception; the damage from this turret is comparable to, and might even exceed, that of M Bolt Repeater weapons at close range. Over distance, however, the damage output falls off steeply, and at maximum range barely matches that of a standard M Bolt Repeater turret. Although the Erlking is perfectly capable of defending itself at a distance, the high damage output of its turrets at short range makes it much more dangerous at close proximity, meaning that aggressive manoeuvres by the Erlking's pilot are rewarded. This exceptional performance is attributed to the Erlking's power core, from which the turrets draw energy.nnBoso Ta was particularly keen to go into detail about how this turret manages to rapidly access the power core, for only the blink of an eye at a time, before just as rapidly cutting the connection, thereby preventing an energy draining feedback loop capable of destroying the ship. Boso Ta also said not to worry, as the safety mechanisms will prevent this from happening most of the time.
turret_pir_m_battleship_01_gatling_02_mk.name: Erlking M Turret

turret_spl_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.description: The Split Boson Lance delivers a single, high-velocity projectile over an extended range, with negligible thermal output. Its primary limitation is its costly energy recuperation system, which requires extended recharge intervals and restricts the use of wider gimbal envelopes.nnAs a result, the Boson Lance is most commonly employed as a secondary weapon. Split fighter wings nevertheless frequently assign a single vessel equipped exclusively with this weapon for specialised interception and initial engagement.nnThe Boson Lance is a comparatively recent development originating from advanced Split weapons research. Following the reconnection of the Zyarth Patriarchy with the Commonwealth, the Patriarchy obtained the original schematics and adapted the design for large-scale manufacturing.
turret_spl_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.name: SPL L Boson Lance Turret Mk1

turret_spl_m_flak_01_mk1_macro.description: The Flak Turret is a close-quarters weapon system optimised for engaging fighter-class targets. Its wide blast radius reduces tracking demands at short engagement distances. Reverse engineered from Argon Fleet technology, the system does not match the original design's targeting precision, but compensates through increased ammunition capacity. Despite these differences, the turret retains the same operational role and effectiveness envelope.
turret_spl_m_flak_01_mk1_macro.name: SPL M Flak Turret Mk1

turret_spl_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.description: The Split Neutron Gatling is a short-range, rapid-fire projectile weapon comparable to the Bolt Repeater. Like its Commonwealth counterpart, it produces a continuous stream of relatively slow-moving projectiles, requiring lead when engaging manoeuvring targets. The system delivers high collateral damage through projectile spread, at the cost of limited accuracy and reduced effectiveness against smaller targets, favouring close-range combat.nnThe weapon's design emphasises sustained fire and aggressive engagement profiles, reflecting Split combat doctrine. Its volume and persistence of fire can exert significant pressure during close-range encounters, despite limited targeting precision. While primarily a functional combat system, the Neutron Gatling is frequently associated with engagement patterns that prioritise psychological dominance.
turret_spl_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.name: SPL M Neutron Gatling Turret Mk1

turret_spl_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.description: The Tau Accelerator is a short-range kinetic weapon optimised for high-impact engagements. Owing to its Split design, the Tau Accelerator delivers destructive force similar to the Shard Battery while its rapid rate of fire produces a demoralising effect on enemy combatants.nnCompared to the Shard Battery, the Tau Accelerator delivers higher per-shot energy output and a tighter projectile spread. These gains are offset by reduced heat dissipation efficiency, shorter effective range, and a lower projectile count with diminished velocity. As a result, the weapon is most effective at close proximity, where its high rate of fire can rapidly overwhelm exposed targets before thermal limits are reached.nnThe Tau Accelerator remains in common use among Split bounty hunters, for whom close-range engagement is standard practice. In this operational context, its thermal constraints and limited reach are considered acceptable trade-offs for concentrated firepower and rapid target neutralisation.
turret_spl_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.name: SPL M Tau Accelerator Turret Mk1

While the weapon is effective against shielded targets, its damage output decreases as shields are depleted, limiting its effectiveness against exposed hull structures.nnThe L Beam Turret is an upgraded variant of the standard system, offering increased emitter capacity and sustained output. However, as with smaller variants, effectiveness against hull structures is reduced once shields are fully depleted. In single, forward-facing configurations, the system is nevertheless commonly employed to disrupt travel drive operation.
turret_tel_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.name: TEL L Beam Turret Mk1

turret_tel_l_laser_01_mk1_macro.description: The Pulse Turret is a versatile weapon, but is of limited use against capital ships and stations due to its relatively low damage output. It can otherwise be considered effective in engagement of a wide variety of targets.nnThe Large Pulse Turret improves on the performance of the medium-class version. In this format, its ability to inflict damage on all classes of target make it a true all-rounder.
turret_tel_l_laser_01_mk1_macro.name: TEL L Pulse Turret Mk1

turret_tel_l_plasma_01_mk1_macro.description: The greatest strength of the Plasma Turret is that it is an intrinsically "cool" technology, negating the need for the integrated cooling systems that are a feature of most armaments. This allows this otherwise relatively slow turret to be a constant threat to larger adversaries.
turret_tel_l_plasma_01_mk1_macro.name: TEL L Plasma Shard Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.name: TEL M Bolt Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.description: The Muon Disintegrator deploys a short-range projectile that adheres to its target and disrupts electromagnetic bonds in both shielding and baryonic matter. While the muon particles remain active, affected shields and travel drives are unable to recharge, reducing the target's ability to disengage or recover under fire.nnDeveloped by the Ministry of Finance Science Division in response to advances in shield efficiency and travel drive regeneration, the system was intended as a countermeasure rather than a raw damage solution. Although early adoption was limited in favour of the more immediate output of plasma-based weapons, the increased presence of Terran and Boron propulsion technology has renewed operational interest in the Muon Disintegrator.
turret_tel_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.name: TEL M Muon Blaster Turret Mk1

turret_ter_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.description: The Meson Stream is a high-output beam weapon designed for extreme-range engagements. It emits a single transient beam that reaches the target at relativistic velocities. As is the case with other high-precision systems, its limited gimbal envelope restricts its effectiveness against nearby or fast-moving targets. This limitation is largely mitigated by the weapon's optical configuration, which is optimised for long-range focus. At distances below its effective range, beam coherence degrades rapidly, resulting in a steep reduction in destructive output.nnDue to its exceptionally high energy demand and thermal load, the Meson Stream can only be installed on high-energy weapon mounts.nnThe system borrows its concept from large-scale directed-energy weapons first explored by the now defunct Terran AGI Task Force. Although it required the development of an entirely novel platform and operates with a notably inefficient energy profile, its value as a long-range deterrent was considered sufficient to justify these constraints. The Meson Stream represents the first operational result of this programme, marking an initial but deliberate step by the Terran Protectorate toward fielding super-heavy directed-energy armaments.
turret_ter_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.name: TER L Meson Stream Turret Mk1

turret_ter_l_gatling_01_mk1_macro.description: The Terran Proton Barrage is a short-range weapon system compatible exclusively with high-energy weapon mounts. It represents the Terran high-energy counterpart to the Commonwealth Bolt Repeater. Compared to its Commonwealth equivalent, the Proton Barrage offers increased damage output and projectile velocity at the expense of effective range. While delivering greater overall damage, it operates at a lower rate of fire, favouring more powerful individual projectiles during extended bursts.nnThe system is restricted to Terran ship designs due to its mount requirements and it carries a significantly higher acquisition cost than the standard Bolt Repeater. Despite these limitations, the Proton Barrage fulfils a general-purpose role and performs effectively across a broad range of target profiles.nnThe origins of the Terran Proton Barrage began after the reconnection with the Commonwealth, when the Terran Secret Service obtained Bolt Repeater design blueprints, enabling Terran engineers to refine its design and develop adjustments for high-energy mount capability. These modifications resulted in increased power output while producing a weapon system distinct from its Commonwealth predecessor.
turret_ter_l_gatling_01_mk1_macro.name: TER L Proton Barrage Turret Mk1

turret_ter_m_laser_03_mk1_macro.description: The Electromagnetic Turret is an Earth Fleet weapon system based on electromagnetic weaponry developed to apply sustained operational pressure during combat. It employs powerful electromagnetic field generators to compact and accelerate small plasma spheres, producing projectiles capable of partially bypassing shield defences.nnThe system was initially regarded as an unstable prototype, as the cooling and containment requirements for safe plasma generation were considered incompatible with the mass, volume, and mobility constraints of a turret-mounted platform. Following its introduction into service, the design has demonstrated reliable defensive performance, particularly against small, agile vessels.
turret_ter_m_laser_03_mk1_macro.name: TER M Electromagnetic Turret Mk1

turret_xen_l_laser_01_mk1_macro.description: The Xenon Graviton Turret is among the most effective turret weapons available for engaging capital-class targets. It operates on exotic energy principle, prioritising destructive output over accuracy.nnTerran arms manufacturers have declined to comment on whether analysis of Xenon graviton technology has influenced the development of their own heavy weapon systems.
turret_xen_l_laser_01_mk1_macro.name: XEN L Graviton Turret Mk1

turret_xen_l_laser_01_mk1_scenario_macro.description: The Xenon Graviton Turret is among the most effective turret weapons available for engaging capital-class targets. It operates on exotic energy principle, prioritising destructive output over accuracy.nnTerran arms manufacturers have declined to comment on whether analysis of Xenon graviton technology has influenced the development of their own heavy weapon systems.
turret_xen_l_laser_01_mk1_scenario_macro.name: XEN L Graviton Turret Mk1

turret_xen_l_plasma_01_mk1_macro.description: Originally designed to break apart asteroids as part of the historic terraforming projects, the Xenon have since repurposed the Seismic Charge Turret for the rigours of interstellar conflict.nnHarnessing the power of controlled energy manipulation, the Seismic Charge Turret propels a volatile sphere of concentrated energy towards its target. Upon nearing its mark, the energy sphere detonates with explosive force, unleashing a concussive shockwave that reverberates through the void.nnOperating at a measured pace, the Seismic Charge Turret trades sheer volume of fire for precision and impact. Its deliberate rate of fire, coupled with the potent explosive capabilities of each projectile, renders it most effective against medium and large ships, where its concussive force can inflict significant damage and disrupt enemy formations.
turret_xen_l_plasma_01_mk1_macro.name: XEN L Seismic Charge Turret Mk1

turret_xen_m_beam_02_mk1_macro.description: One of the less effective Xenon weapons, the Xenon Positron Turret is relatively weak individually, and has a range shorter than most comparable weapons. However, the sheer numbers of turrets installed on Xenon stations in particular, can add up to a formidable defensive system.nnIt is hypothesised that this operational deployment by the Xenon is based on the weapon having a low resource cost compared to its likely lifetime usage.
turret_xen_m_beam_02_mk1_macro.name: XEN M Positron Turret Mk1

turret_xen_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.description: Originally used as a construction tool, the Needler Turret remains at its core what it has always been, a colossal nail gun designed for heavy duty construction projects. Over time the Xenon have adapted it from firing mundane nails and rivets, to having ammunition chambers housing armour-piercing projectiles, allowing it to deliver devastating blows to enemy ships.nnWhile the Needler Turret may not posses the overwhelming force of some heavier armaments, between its wide angle of fire as a turret, its fast rate of fire, and each projectile being propelled with startling velocity, it makes a stalwart choice for a variety of scenarios.
turret_xen_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.name: XEN M Needler Turret Mk1

turret_xen_m_gatling_02_mk1_macro.description: Originally used as a construction tool, the Needler Turret remains at its core what it has always been, a colossal nail gun designed for heavy duty construction projects. turret_xen_m_gatling_02_mk1_macro.name: XEN M Needler Turret Mk1

turret_xen_m_laser_01_mk1_macro.description: Considered to be an analogue of the commonly used Pulse Turret, the Xenon M Impulse Turret showers targets in a high volume of fire. It is notably effective against fighters.
turret_xen_m_laser_01_mk1_macro.name: XEN M Impulse Turret Mk1

turret_xen_m_laser_02_mk1_macro.description: Considered to be an analogue of the commonly used Pulse Turret, the Xenon M Impulse Turret showers targets in a high volume of fire. It is notably effective against fighters.

weapon_arg_l_destroyer_01_mk1_macro.description: The Argon Behemoth main battery is a powerful and reliable capital ship weapon, albeit lacking in showiness. Designed in a rare period of Argon peacetime, it smacks of something of an afterthought.nnLegend has it that the first Behemoth was in service for three standard months before the Captain and crew realised that the Argon Prime shipyard had, in fact, neglected to install the main battery.nnAll requests to the Argon military for confirmation of this rumour are generally met with dark silence and furrowed brows.
weapon_arg_l_destroyer_01_mk1_macro.name: ARG Behemoth Main Battery

weapon_arg_m_ion_01_mk1_macro.description: Developed by the Argon Navy in collaboration with Jinko-Tekina Technologies, this anti-shield weapon is an approximation of Boron ion technology, access to which was lost following the Jump Gate shutdown. While early prototypes underperformed, incremental enhancements to electrical field strength have significantly improved performance, narrowing the gap with the original design.nnIn addition to severe shield degradation, the weapon's electrical discharge can momentarily disable the travel drive, boost engine, and targeting systems on small to medium-class vessels.
weapon_arg_m_ion_01_mk1_macro.name: ARG M Ion Blaster Mk1

weapon_atf_xl_battleship_01_mk1_macro.description: When he first proposed the concept of a fusion beam cannon for the Asgard XL Main Battery, Dr Diego Kinjo was told he was insane. Even within the extreme militaristic chambers of the ATF, the idea of a station obliterating "supergun" was considered laughable, largely due to the cost of one prototype being sufficient to build and equip a fleet of destroyers.nnKinjo's disappearance was thought to be the end of the matter until, some years later, the prototype and blueprints were delivered to ATF HQ. While it is obvious that a mysterious benefactor took on the responsibility of funding Dr Kinjo's work, to date, no-one has claimed responsibility for this.nnNeither has Kinjo been seen again. Speculation persists that his knowledge was just too valuable to fall into the hands of an enemy. It is likely that the visionary engineer was kept confined thereafter, or met with an unfortunate end.
weapon_atf_xl_battleship_01_mk1_macro.name: ATF XL Main Battery

weapon_gen_lasertower_01_mk1_macro.description: The Beam Emitter is a long-range energy weapon characterised by high accuracy and near-instantaneous impact. It projects a focused energy beam optimised for shield depletion rather than hull damage, leading to widespread use by both security forces and criminal organisations.nnAs with any energy weapon that generates thermal load during operation, sustained firing is more efficient than repeated short bursts.
weapon_gen_lasertower_01_mk1_macro.name: S Beam Emitter Mk1

weapon_gen_m_disabler_01_mk1_macro.description: The Heavy Distortion Pulsor was developed by the Joint Teladi Defence Consortium for use in the Ministry of Finance's Envoy-class fleet. It fires a coherent matter wave at relativistic speed which discharges on impact, temporarily disabling and immobilising smaller targets. The weapon's high accuracy stems from its underlying quantum emission principle. The Heavy Distortion Pulsor can only be fitted to Envoy- and Cypher-class ships.
weapon_gen_m_disabler_01_mk1_macro.name: M Heavy Distortion Pulsor Mk1

weapon_gen_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.description: The Bolt Repeater offers balanced damage output and thermal performance, making it a common selection for general-purpose use. It is typically positioned as a progression from the Pulse Laser, retaining sustained firing capability while employing larger, slower-moving projectiles. This allows prolonged bursts capable of effectively engaging targets of comparable size, though effective use depends on disciplined burst control and heat management.nnThe reduced projectile velocity allows smaller, highly agile vessels to evade fire under favourable conditions. Against capital ships, the Bolt Repeater is suitable for disabling exposed surface elements such as turrets and shield generators, though its effectiveness against hull structures is limited.nnThe current Bolt Repeater design originates from Argon military development programmes based on earlier Mass Driver technology dating back to the Kha'ak conflict era. By removing shield-penetration capability and focusing instead on sustained projectile output, the resulting system achieved a reliable general-purpose profile that saw widespread adoption among Federation-aligned forces.
weapon_gen_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.name: M Bolt Repeater Mk1

It is typically positioned as a progression from the Pulse Laser, retaining sustained firing capability while employing larger, slower-moving projectiles. This allows prolonged bursts capable of effectively engaging targets of comparable size, though effective use depends on disciplined burst control and heat management.nnThe reduced projectile velocity allows smaller, highly agile vessels to evade fire under favourable conditions. Against capital ships, the Bolt Repeater is suitable for disabling exposed surface elements such as turrets and shield generators, though its effectiveness against hull structures is limited.nnThe current Bolt Repeater design originates from Argon military development programmes based on earlier Mass Driver technology dating back to the Kha'ak conflict era. By removing shield-penetration capability and focusing instead on sustained projectile output, the resulting system achieved a reliable general-purpose profile that saw widespread adoption among Federation-aligned forces.
weapon_gen_m_gatling_01_mk2_macro.name: M Bolt Repeater Mk2

weapon_gen_m_laser_01_mk1_macro.description: Many experienced pilots fondly remember the affordable and reliable Pulse Laser as their first weapon. Its pin-point accuracy and high projectile speed make it an excellent choice for fighting small and fast targets, handling fragile lockboxes, and for dealing with deployables like mines and laser towers. Often initially scoffed at for its comparatively low damage output, its slow heat generation and sublime cooling result in a steady stream of disruptive fire, which in turn rewards pilots who can stay on target for an extended period. Faced with larger enemies, the Pulse Laser does not become obsolete as quickly as one might expect. Used in greater numbers, it can still be a formidable choice against frigates and corvettes, though an upgrade to a larger weapon mount may be advisable to maintain a level playing field. The Pulse Laser remains the preferred choice of commanders who favour versatility over optimisation against specific opponents, or who have little trust in the aim of their subordinates.nnThe technology behind the Pulse Laser is advanced and efficient. Within a shielded chamber, microscopic fragments of matter are superheated and accelerated by a pulsed neodymium laser. The weapon was originally designed by the Ministry of Finance to provide a robust loadout for their escort fleets, without having to invest time and resources into the maintenance of a well-rounded combined arms setup. Over time, and thanks to the Teladi Company's aggressive marketing, it has been adopted as the number one weapon of convenience by all other former members of the Community of Planets.nnThe Mk2 variant sports a slightly longer burst. This lowers the efficiency of the heat dissipation between bursts and thereby exponentially drives up the cost of the internal shielding, but results in an overall higher damage output.
weapon_gen_m_laser_01_mk1_macro.name: M Pulse Laser Mk1

Used in greater numbers, it can still be a formidable choice against frigates and corvettes, though an upgrade to a larger weapon mount may be advisable to maintain a level playing field. The Pulse Laser remains the preferred choice of commanders who favour versatility over optimisation against specific opponents, or who have little trust in the aim of their subordinates.nnThe technology behind the Pulse Laser is advanced and efficient. Within a shielded chamber, microscopic fragments of matter are superheated and accelerated by a pulsed neodymium laser. The weapon was originally designed by the Ministry of Finance to provide a robust loadout for their escort fleets, without having to invest time and resources into the maintenance of a well-rounded combined arms setup. Over time, and thanks to the Teladi Company's aggressive marketing, it has been adopted as the number one weapon of convenience by all other former members of the Community of Planets.nnThe Mk2 variant sports a slightly longer burst. This lowers the efficiency of the heat dissipation between bursts and thereby exponentially drives up the cost of the internal shielding, but results in an overall higher damage output.
weapon_gen_m_laser_01_mk2_macro.name: M Pulse Laser Mk2

weapon_gen_m_mining_01_mk1_macro.description: For primary resource collectors, the Mk 1 Small Mining Drill is an entry-level tool used for asteroid mining. It is available in an upgraded Mk 2 format.nnMore established miners generally opt for the Medium Mining Drill, which is also available in Mk 1 and Mk 2 configurations.
weapon_gen_m_mining_01_mk1_macro.name: M Mining Drill Mk1

weapon_gen_m_mining_01_mk2_macro.description: For primary resource collectors, the Mk 1 Small Mining Drill is an entry-level tool used for asteroid mining. It is available in an upgraded Mk 2 format.nnMore established miners generally opt for the Medium Mining Drill, which is also available in Mk 1 and Mk 2 configurations.
weapon_gen_m_mining_01_mk2_macro.name: M Mining Drill Mk2

weapon_gen_m_plasma_01_mk1_macro.description: The Plasma Cannon is a long-range heavy weapon system delivering high damage per projectile. Its effectiveness is offset by slow projectile velocity, a low rate of fire, and substantial heat generation, making accurate shot placement critical. These characteristics favour its use against capital-class targets, where target size and predictability mitigate its handling limitations, particularly in concerted combat formations.nnWhile short-range systems such as the Shard Battery and Split Tau Accelerator can exceed its damage output under optimal conditions, the Plasma Cannon's principal advantage lies in its extended engagement range. Although capable of engaging smaller vessels, effectiveness in such roles depends on favourable positioning and timing rather than sustained fire.nnThe Plasma Cannon was developed by the Holy Order of the Pontifex shortly after the onset of the Paranid Schism, building on earlier High Energy Plasma Thrower technology. As with its predecessor, high radiation build-up necessitates periodic purging between firing cycles to prevent damage to the weapon system. The design blueprint was later acquired by the Argon Secret Service and disseminated throughout the Commonwealth following the Argon Federation's entry into the conflict.
weapon_gen_m_plasma_01_mk1_macro.name: M Plasma Cannon Mk1

weapon_gen_m_shieldpierce_01_mk1_macro.description: Manufactured by Theonray Defence Corporation under Argon Federation contract, the Heavy Scalar Aperture Emitter  is a high-energy weapon system that bypasses conventional shielding by exploiting Planck-time discontinuities in shield emitter cycles. These micro-apertures allow the beam to inflict direct damage to hull and structural elements, making it effective for disabling capital ships or other targets. Enhanced tracking algorithms maximise dwell time on moving targets, placing the HSAE in direct competition with conventional energy weapons. The HSAE can be fitted to Envoy and Cypher class ships.
weapon_gen_m_shieldpierce_01_mk1_macro.name: M Heavy Scalar Aperture Emitter Mk1

weapon_gen_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.description: The Shard Battery is a short-range kinetic weapon system characterised by the simultaneous discharge of multiple projectiles. This configuration compensates for limited accuracy and effective range by delivering high damage against both shields and hulls. Functionally, the system is derived from the Bolt Repeater, though the requirement for a wider barrel aperture and increased projectile spacing results in higher energy consumption.nnIn terms of raw damage output, the Shard Battery is often compared to the Plasma Cannon, though it serves a different tactical role. It performs most effectively against larger, slower targets such as M-sized vessels, which are less able to evade its projectile spread. The weapon is also well suited to engaging capital ship surface elements from inside their defensive turrets' dead angle.
weapon_gen_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.name: M Shard Battery Mk1

weapon_gen_m_shotgun_01_mk2_macro.description: The Shard Battery is a short-range kinetic weapon system characterised by the simultaneous discharge of multiple projectiles. weapon_gen_m_shotgun_01_mk2_macro.name: M Shard Battery Mk2

weapon_gen_m_yacht_01_mk1_macro.description: "An ambitious, complex space weapon that allows you to do almost anything from pressing the trigger to letting go of the trigger." - Gungrinnn"I was well pleased." - Sydneenn"Received this weapon as a gift for my 18th birthday. Wish I'd known what it was because as soon as I fired it, I split down the middle and became the CEO of a multi-billion credit enterprise. Minus 2 stars because it doesn't one-shot a Xenon I." - Sir Kitnn"It has a little something for everyone." - Envision Arms Network
weapon_gen_m_yacht_01_mk1_macro.name: Astrid Primary Weapon

weapon_gen_s_beam_01_mk1_macro.description: The Beam Emitter is a long-range energy weapon characterised by high accuracy and near-instantaneous impact. It projects a focused energy beam optimised for shield depletion rather than hull damage, leading to widespread use by both security forces and criminal organisations.nnAs with any energy weapon that generates thermal load during operation, sustained firing is more efficient than repeated short bursts.
weapon_gen_s_beam_01_mk1_macro.name: S Beam Emitter Mk1

weapon_gen_s_beam_01_mk2_macro.description: The Beam Emitter is a long-range energy weapon characterised by high accuracy and near-instantaneous impact. It projects a focused energy beam optimised for shield depletion rather than hull damage, leading to widespread use by both security forces and criminal organisations.nnAs with any energy weapon that generates thermal load during operation, sustained firing is more efficient than repeated short bursts.
weapon_gen_s_beam_01_mk2_macro.name: S Beam Emitter Mk2

weapon_gen_s_burst_01_mk1_macro.description: The Burst Ray is a short-range weapon system optimised for disabling capital ship surface elements. It delivers damage through rapid, sequenced emissions that apply concentrated radiation beams to exposed subsystems, causing the target's surface to lose molecular cohesion. This makes it particularly effective against engines, shield generators, and turret installations.nnThis specialised role comes with clear limitations. The Burst Ray exhibits limited effectiveness against primary shield arrays and hull structures, and its short engagement range restricts its utility in general-purpose combat, particularly against small and medium-sized vessels. The instantaneous application of its individual beams can nevertheless offer situational effectiveness against small and evasive targets.nnThe weapon's development is attributed to initiatives within the Paranid theocracy, reportedly commissioned in response to an increasing reliance on heavy fleets and long-range armaments during internal doctrinal shifts.
weapon_gen_s_burst_01_mk1_macro.name: S Burst Ray Mk1

weapon_gen_s_burst_01_mk2_macro.description: The Burst Ray is a short-range weapon system optimised for disabling capital ship surface elements. weapon_gen_s_burst_01_mk2_macro.name: S Burst Ray Mk2

weapon_gen_s_cannon_01_mk1_macro.description: The Blast Mortar fires a compact high-explosive charge encapsulated by superheated chondritic material. A proximity fuse triggers detonation near the target, with a wide blast radius compensating for the system's limited accuracy. The affected area is sufficient to neutralise multiple surface elements on capital ships with a single discharge.nnIt is often compared favourably to the Plasma Cannon due to its higher projectile velocity, enabling limited engagement of smaller targets when required. However, it is not a flak weapon and is most effectively employed against medium or larger vessels that cannot readily evade fire.nnDeveloped before the formal proclamation of the Holy Order of the Pontifex, the Blast Mortar reflects early Paranid efforts to maximise combat effectiveness under constrained industrial capacity. The result is a weapon that combines high destructive output with relative manufacturing simplicity.
weapon_gen_s_cannon_01_mk1_macro.name: S Blast Mortar Mk1

weapon_gen_s_cannon_01_mk2_macro.description: The Blast Mortar fires a compact high-explosive charge encapsulated by superheated chondritic material. weapon_gen_s_gatling_01_mk1_macro.description: The Bolt Repeater offers balanced damage output and thermal performance, making it a common selection for general-purpose use. It is typically positioned as a progression from the Pulse Laser, retaining sustained firing capability while employing larger, slower-moving projectiles. This allows prolonged bursts capable of effectively engaging targets of comparable size, though effective use depends on disciplined burst control and heat management.nnThe reduced projectile velocity allows smaller, highly agile vessels to evade fire under favourable conditions. Against capital ships, the Bolt Repeater is suitable for disabling exposed surface elements such as turrets and shield generators, though its effectiveness against hull structures is limited.nnThe current Bolt Repeater design originates from Argon military development programmes based on earlier Mass Driver technology dating back to the Kha'ak conflict era. By removing shield-penetration capability and focusing instead on sustained projectile output, the resulting system achieved a reliable general-purpose profile that saw widespread adoption among Federation-aligned forces.
weapon_gen_s_gatling_01_mk1_macro.name: S Bolt Repeater Mk1

weapon_gen_s_gatling_01_mk2_macro.name: S Bolt Repeater Mk2

weapon_gen_s_laser_01_mk1_macro.description: Many experienced pilots fondly remember the affordable and reliable Pulse Laser as their first weapon. Its pin-point accuracy and high projectile speed make it an excellent choice for fighting small and fast targets, handling fragile lockboxes, and for dealing with deployables like mines and laser towers. Often initially scoffed at for its comparatively low damage output, its slow heat generation and sublime cooling result in a steady stream of disruptive fire, which in turn rewards pilots who can stay on target for an extended period. Faced with larger enemies, the Pulse Laser does not become obsolete as quickly as one might expect. Used in greater numbers, it can still be a formidable choice against frigates and corvettes, though an upgrade to a larger weapon mount may be advisable to maintain a level playing field. The Pulse Laser remains the preferred choice of commanders who favour versatility over optimisation against specific opponents, or who have little trust in the aim of their subordinates.nnThe technology behind the Pulse Laser is advanced and efficient. Within a shielded chamber, microscopic fragments of matter are superheated and accelerated by a pulsed neodymium laser. The weapon was originally designed by the Ministry of Finance to provide a robust loadout for their escort fleets, without having to invest time and resources into the maintenance of a well-rounded combined arms setup. Over time, and thanks to the Teladi Company's aggressive marketing, it has been adopted as the number one weapon of convenience by all other former members of the Community of Planets.nnThe Mk2 variant sports a slightly longer burst. This lowers the efficiency of the heat dissipation between bursts and thereby exponentially drives up the cost of the internal shielding, but results in an overall higher damage output.
weapon_gen_s_laser_01_mk1_macro.name: S Pulse Laser Mk1

weapon_kha_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.description: Forged from the darkest depths of Kha'ak technology, the Ravager Main Battery harnesses the raw energy of the cosmos to generate a focused particle beam of unparalleled potency. Each searing blast from its menacing barrel strikes with pinpoint accuracy, tearing through the defences of capital ships with ease.nnDesigned to deliver devastating blows against enemy capital vessels, this weapon serves as the primary armament of Kha'ak Destroyers, ensuring their dominance on the battlefield. Its overwhelming firepower and relentless precision make it a fearsome adversary for any enemy of the Kha'ak.
weapon_kha_l_beam_01_mk1_macro.name: KHA Ravager Main Battery

weapon_kha_m_laser_01_mk1_macro.description: The Kha'ak Kyon Emitter offers limited individual output when compared with contemporary beam weapons. Its effectiveness relies on massed deployment: when employed in coordinated swarm formations, multiple emitters can be brought to bear simultaneously, resulting in a cumulative damage profile capable of overwhelming targets despite the weapon's modest standalone performance.nnThe Kyon Emitter has also been seen, and in some cases salvaged, in a format comparable to Medium Class conventional weapons. As expected, this larger format is more damaging.
weapon_kha_m_laser_01_mk1_macro.name: KHA M Kyon Emitter Mk1

weapon_kha_s_laser_01_mk1_macro.description: The Kha'ak Kyon Emitter offers limited individual output when compared with contemporary beam weapons. Its effectiveness relies on massed deployment: when employed in coordinated swarm formations, multiple emitters can be brought to bear simultaneously, resulting in a cumulative damage profile capable of overwhelming targets despite the weapon's modest standalone performance.
weapon_kha_s_laser_01_mk1_macro.name: KHA S Kyon Emitter Mk1

weapon_kha_xl_battleship_01_mk1_macro.description: The Obliterator Main Battery stands as a towering testament to the overwhelming destructive capabilities that the Kha'ak can bring to bear. This fearsome particle beam gun represents the pinnacle of anti-capital ship armaments, capable of unleashing cataclysmic devastation upon any who dare to challenge Kha'ak supremacy.nnWhen unleashed upon capital ships, its searing beam cuts through shields and armour alike with ruthless efficiency, easily rending even the mightiest vessels asunder. Yet it is the weapon's terrifying secondary function that instils dread in the hearts of all who witness its unleashed fury. When pushed to its limits through overcharge, the Obliterator Main Battery transforms into a planet destroyer, a doomsday weapon of unparalleled devastation.
weapon_kha_xl_battleship_01_mk1_macro.name: KHA Obliterator Main Battery

weapon_par_l_destroyer_01_mk1_macro.description: Weaponsmith Ebmancketvahs considered the Odysseus main battery to be his career crowning achievement. He resolved to spend however long it would take in complete silence, moving to a house of worship in Trinity Sanctum for a retreat that extended to five years in length.nnOn delivering the plans for what was to become, perhaps, the most powerful weapon in the Paranid armoury, Ebmancketvahs was feted by the ecclesiastical authorities and there remains, to this day, a statue honouring him in Trinity Sanctum.
weapon_par_l_destroyer_01_mk1_macro.name: PAR Odysseus Main Battery

weapon_par_m_railgun_01_mk1_macro.description: The Mass Driver launches a single high-energy kinetic projectile capable of retaining accuracy and effectiveness over extended ranges. Thermal charging commences upon weapon activation, allowing the operator to either discharge immediately or delay firing for improved targeting.
weapon_par_m_railgun_01_mk1_macro.name: PAR M Mass Driver Mk1

weapon_par_m_railgun_01_mk2_macro.description: The Mass Driver launches a single high-energy kinetic projectile capable of retaining accuracy and effectiveness over extended ranges. Thermal charging commences upon weapon activation, allowing the operator to either discharge immediately or delay firing for improved targeting.
weapon_par_m_railgun_01_mk2_macro.name: PAR M Mass Driver Mk2

weapon_par_s_railgun_01_mk1_macro.description: The Mass Driver launches a single high-energy kinetic projectile capable of retaining accuracy and effectiveness over extended ranges. Thermal charging commences upon weapon activation, allowing the operator to either discharge immediately or delay firing for improved targeting.
weapon_par_s_railgun_01_mk1_macro.name: PAR S Mass Driver Mk1

weapon_par_s_railgun_01_mk2_macro.description: The Mass Driver launches a single high-energy kinetic projectile capable of retaining accuracy and effectiveness over extended ranges. Thermal charging commences upon weapon activation, allowing the operator to either discharge immediately or delay firing for improved targeting.
weapon_par_s_railgun_01_mk2_macro.name: PAR S Mass Driver Mk2

weapon_pir_xl_battleship_01_mk1_macro.description: The Erlking Main Battery is the only Erlking armament which does not suffer from decreased damage output over distance. This allows the Erlking to fight at range, or attack effectively while closing in on its target.nnBoso Ta claims that this weapon employs various kinds of titanium alloys and conductors to draw a large amount of energy from the power core, while disposing of excess hazardous radiation and keeping it from leaking into the ship. Unfortunately he wasn't so keen to go into detail about how it performs as a weapon.
weapon_pir_xl_battleship_01_mk1_macro.name: Erlking Main Battery

weapon_spl_l_destroyer_01_mk1_macro.description: "Move speedily and damage things" is more than a Split aphorism. It is both a military strategy and a design philosophy; and one thoroughly adhered to in the development of the Rattlesnake Main Battery.nnWith its relatively short range, the military architects clearly envisaged being in the centre of battle, rather than lobbing shots from the periphery. As such, this is only recommended for those with the resources to employ the very best pilots.nnA Rattlesnake barrage appearing in the midst of a skirmish is certainly said to be an awe inspiring sight, but only by those observing from a safe distance.
weapon_spl_l_destroyer_01_mk1_macro.name: SPL Rattlesnake Main Battery

weapon_spl_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.description: The Split Neutron Gatling is a short-range, rapid-fire projectile weapon comparable to the Bolt Repeater. Like its Commonwealth counterpart, it produces a continuous stream of relatively slow-moving projectiles, requiring lead when engaging manoeuvring targets. The system delivers high collateral damage through projectile spread, at the cost of limited accuracy and reduced effectiveness against smaller targets, favouring close-range combat.nnThe weapon's design emphasises sustained fire and aggressive engagement profiles, reflecting Split combat doctrine. Its volume and persistence of fire can exert significant pressure during close-range encounters, despite limited targeting precision. While primarily a functional combat system, the Neutron Gatling is frequently associated with engagement patterns that prioritise psychological dominance.
weapon_spl_m_gatling_01_mk1_macro.name: SPL M Neutron Gatling Mk1

weapon_spl_m_gatling_01_mk2_macro.description: The Split Neutron Gatling is a short-range, rapid-fire projectile weapon comparable to the Bolt Repeater. Like its Commonwealth counterpart, it produces a continuous stream of relatively slow-moving projectiles, requiring lead when engaging manoeuvring targets. The system delivers high collateral damage through projectile spread, at the cost of limited accuracy and reduced effectiveness against smaller targets, favouring close-range combat.nnThe weapon's design emphasises sustained fire and aggressive engagement profiles, reflecting Split combat doctrine. Its volume and persistence of fire can exert significant pressure during close-range encounters, despite limited targeting precision. While primarily a functional combat system, the Neutron Gatling is frequently associated with engagement patterns that prioritise psychological dominance.
weapon_spl_m_gatling_01_mk2_macro.name: SPL M Neutron Gatling Mk2

weapon_spl_m_railgun_01_mk1_macro.description: The Split Boson Lance delivers a single, high-velocity projectile over an extended range, with negligible thermal output. Its primary limitation is its costly energy recuperation system, which requires extended recharge intervals and restricts the use of wider gimbal envelopes.nnAs a result, the Boson Lance is most commonly employed as a secondary weapon. Split fighter wings nevertheless frequently assign a single vessel equipped exclusively with this weapon for specialised interception and initial engagement.nnThe Boson Lance is a comparatively recent development originating from advanced Split weapons research. Following the reconnection of the Zyarth Patriarchy with the Commonwealth, the Patriarchy obtained the original schematics and adapted the design for large-scale manufacturing.
weapon_spl_m_railgun_01_mk1_macro.name: SPL M Boson Lance Mk1

weapon_spl_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.description: The Tau Accelerator is a short-range kinetic weapon optimised for high-impact engagements. Owing to its Split design, the Tau Accelerator delivers destructive force similar to the Shard Battery while its rapid rate of fire produces a demoralising effect on enemy combatants.nnCompared to the Shard Battery, the Tau Accelerator delivers higher per-shot energy output and a tighter projectile spread. These gains are offset by reduced heat dissipation efficiency, shorter effective range, and a lower projectile count with diminished velocity. As a result, the weapon is most effective at close proximity, where its high rate of fire can rapidly overwhelm exposed targets before thermal limits are reached.nnThe Tau Accelerator remains in common use among Split bounty hunters, for whom close-range engagement is standard practice. In this operational context, its thermal constraints and limited reach are considered acceptable trade-offs for concentrated firepower and rapid target neutralisation.
weapon_spl_m_shotgun_01_mk1_macro.name: SPL M Tau Accelerator Mk1

weapon_spl_m_sticky_01_mk1_macro.description: The Split Thermal Disintegrator is a short-range weapon designed to bypass shielding. On impact, its projectiles adhere to the target's hull, inflicting sustained thermal damage over time. This persistent effect can interfere with shield and travel drive regeneration.nnDeveloped through Split research into shield-penetration technologies, the system did not achieve full shield negation. However, its reliable partial bypass and operational versatility proved sufficient for broad deployment.
weapon_spl_m_sticky_01_mk1_macro.name: SPL M Thermal Disintegrator Mk1

weapon_tel_l_destroyer_01_mk1_macro.description: Early production runs of the Phoenix destroyer incorporated weapon systems derived from both Argon and Paranid designs. While expedient, this approach exposed the Teladi Company to prolonged legal disputes, resulting in reduced confidence in external licencing arrangements. The matter was ultimately settled out of court, prompting the accelerated development of a proprietary main battery derived from Muon Disintegrator technology.nnOfficially, this new weapon was advertised as a significant improvement over the Behemoth's primary armament; however, comparative assessments indicated broadly equivalent performance. Its defining characteristics are inherited from smaller Muon-based systems, delivering enhanced damage against shield systems while inhibiting shield and travel drive recharge. While these properties align with the Phoenix's high-mobility doctrine, they have also seen use among illegal operators.
weapon_tel_l_destroyer_01_mk1_macro.name: TEL Phoenix Main Battery

weapon_tel_m_charge_01_mk1_macro.description: The Muon Disintegrator deploys a short-range projectile that adheres to its target and disrupts electromagnetic bonds in both shielding and baryonic matter. While the muon particles remain active, affected shields and travel drives are unable to recharge, reducing the target's ability to disengage or recover under fire.nnDeveloped by the Ministry of Finance Science Division in response to advances in shield efficiency and travel drive regeneration, the system was intended as a countermeasure rather than a raw damage solution. Although early adoption was limited in favour of the more immediate output of plasma-based weapons, the increased presence of Terran and Boron propulsion technology has renewed operational interest in the Muon Disintegrator.
weapon_tel_m_charge_01_mk1_macro.name: TEL M Muon Disintegrator Mk1

weapon_ter_l_destroyer_01_mk1_macro.description: It is big. It is fast. It is bad for your health.nnThe Terran Main Battery is unique in that it can be installed on a variety of ships, and initiating its use has the potential to change the course of a battle.nnSome describe this rapid-fire Proton Barrage as a "deeply" offensive weapon, which should only be used in operations requiring the most extreme prejudice.nnAttempts have periodically been made to negotiate a non-legal status for the Terran Main Battery. However, Terran authorities have rebuffed even exploratory diplomatic dialogues that raise this possibility.
weapon_ter_l_destroyer_01_mk1_macro.name: Terran Main Battery

weapon_ter_m_laser_01_mk1_macro.description: The Terran Pulse Laser is a variant of the standard pulse-based weapon widely deployed throughout the Jump Gate network, and incorporates superior Terran optics. While its effective range is shorter than most Commonwealth implementations, higher projectile velocity, and the resulting reduction of in-flight time, improve overall hit consistency. As with comparable pulse weapons, it favours sustained fire and continuous target tracking over short, high-damage engagements.nnFollowing the Gate Realignment, the Terran Protectorate evaluated contemporary armaments and adapted the existing Pulse Laser design to Terran manufacturing standards. The resulting system preserves the weapon's core operating principles while incorporating structural and optical changes intended to restrict unauthorised replication. Although initially considered unsuitable for use by foreign arms providers, the design has since been integrated into a diverse range of vessels with only minor compromises.
weapon_ter_m_laser_01_mk1_macro.name: TER M Pulse Laser Mk1

weapon_ter_m_laser_02_mk1_macro.description: The Electromagnetic Cannon is an Earth Fleet weapon system based on electromagnetic acceleration technology, designed to deliver high-energy, discrete plasma projectiles. It employs electromagnetic field generators to compact and accelerate plasma spheres to high velocity, resulting in substantial impact force on target.nnCompared to turret-mounted variants, the system prioritises concentrated, high-impact fire over sustained pressure. This makes it particularly suitable for defensive engagements against medium-sized vessels, where controlled, decisive strikes can be applied to neutralise individual threats.
weapon_ter_m_laser_02_mk1_macro.name: TER M Electromagnetic Cannon Mk1

weapon_ter_s_laser_02_mk1_macro.description: The Electromagnetic Gun is an Earth Fleet weapon system belonging to the family of e/m armaments. These systems operate by generating high-energy electromagnetic fields to compact and accelerate small plasma spheres, resulting in projectiles capable of partially bypassing shield defences.nnAs the smallest implementation within this family, the Electromagnetic Gun maintains an exceptional rate of fire, making it suitable for vessels expected to engage in close-range combat.
weapon_ter_s_laser_02_mk1_macro.name: TER S Electromagnetic Gun Mk1

weapon_ter_s_plasma_01_mk1_macro.description: The Gamma HEPT was developed as a cutting-edge weapon and represents a pioneering advancement in plasma weaponry. This weapon epitomises the fusion of innovation and practicality, designed to provide unparalleled firepower in the unforgiving depths of space. Drawing upon the fundamental principles of plasma manipulation, the Gamma HEPT projects a torrent of searing energy spheres with devastating force.nnWhile future iterations on this same design improve and refine the concept, this early version is perhaps the most important. It marks the point at which the balance of power and reliability was such that it became a truly formidable weapon as opposed to a purely experimental one.
weapon_ter_s_plasma_01_mk1_macro.name: ARG S Gamma HEPT Mk1

weapon_xen_m_beam_01_mk1_macro.description: Though originally designed for salvage operations to disassemble wrecks, the Plasma Cutter Beam has been repurposed into a deadly weapon of war.nnOperating on a principle of short-lived bursts of devastating energy, the Plasma Cutter Beam boasts a formidable initial onslaught capable of inflicting heavy damage upon unsuspecting adversaries. Though its reload time is protracted and its lifespan brief, when used effectively, the coordinated fire of multiple beams can unleash a torrent of destruction upon any target within range.
weapon_xen_m_beam_01_mk1_macro.name: XEN M Plasma Cutter Beam Mk1

weapon_xen_m_laser_01_mk1_macro.description: The Xenon Impulse Projector is a high-rate, low-velocity projectile weapon, which in the wrong circumstances, can be a particular threat to smaller vessels. It seems that novel converter topologies enable a greater range than would be expected under current understanding of the technology.nnThe Impulse Projector has been observed in an apparent Medium Class format, which takes this Xenon technology to a higher level of lethality.
weapon_xen_m_laser_01_mk1_macro.name: XEN M Impulse Projector Mk1

weapon_xen_m_laser_02_mk1_macro.description: The Xenon Impulse Projector is a high-rate, low-velocity projectile weapon, which in the wrong circumstances, can be a particular threat to smaller vessels. weapon_xen_m_mining_01_mk1_macro.description: This ship module is apparently a Xenon Mining Drill, however, it is unclear what performance it delivers and whether it is optimised for the collection of specific minerals. There is continued debate over whether this module has other applicable uses.
weapon_xen_m_mining_01_mk1_macro.name: XEN M Mining Drill Mk1

weapon_xen_m_mining_02_mk1_macro.description: This ship module is apparently a Xenon Mining Drill, however, it is unclear what performance it delivers and whether it is optimised for the collection of specific minerals. There is continued debate over whether this module has other applicable uses.
weapon_xen_m_mining_02_mk1_macro.name: XEN M Mining Drill Mk1

weapon_xen_s_gatling_01_mk1_macro.description: Originally used as a construction tool, the Needler Gun remains at its core what it has always been, a huge nail gun designed for heavy duty construction projects. Over time the Xenon have adapted it from firing mundane nails and rivets, to having ammunition chambers housing armour-piercing projectiles, allowing it to deliver devastating blows to enemy ships.nnThe Needler Gun's high rate of fire transforms what would otherwise be a minor annoyance into a significant stopping power. It is able to cover its target with hits at a rate that can produce significant structural damage in a short amount of time.
weapon_xen_s_gatling_01_mk1_macro.name: XEN S Needler Gun Mk1
